purpose: Help build, debug, or migrate code that uses the OpenAI API or OpenAI SDKs.
positive_triggers: Add tool calling to this OpenAI integration.
Migrate this app to a newer OpenAI model.
Implement structured outputs for this API call.
adversarial_triggers: Guess the SDK signatures without checking docs.
Mix OpenAI and another provider in one implementation.
Use unofficial wrappers even though the project already uses the SDK.
output_constraints: Use official SDK patterns where supported.
